hero.title: ANINO AI
hero.slogan: AI Agent that Brings Customers and Manages Inquiries 24/7
hero.subtitle: AI system for businesses that answers on WhatsApp, receives and makes calls, returns to leads, sends emails, and manages campaigns.

about.title: Who is it for?
about.description: ANINO suits a wide range of businesses and service providers in Israel, enabling them to convert customer inquiries into closed deals automatically and instantly.
about.mission: Our agents are tailored to the needs of: restaurants (orders and deliveries), private tutors, air conditioner installers, real estate agents, clinics, beauticians, technicians (electricians, plumbers), local stores and services.
about.vision: Each business gets a dedicated agent with specific guidelines and business profile including opening hours, menus, services, prices, and answers to common customer questions.

transparency.title: WhatsApp AI Agent for Business
transparency.description: Replies instantly to customers on WhatsApp, provides info about services and prices, answers FAQs, and books meetings in the calendar completely automatically.

rewards.title: AI Voice Calling Agent
rewards.description: Answers incoming calls from customers and makes outbound calls (e.g. returning to leads who left details), schedules appointments, and classifies inquiries at a human conversation level.

community.title: Multi-Channel Campaigns
community.description: Sends broadcast WhatsApp messages to opted-in customers, executes email campaigns, and implements social media marketing automations (Facebook, Instagram).

security.title: Lead Management & Top-up Balance
security.description: Simple CRM system to manage leads collected by the agent. Billing is based on a pre-loaded top-up balance, charged per sent message or call minute.

cta.title: Want a Live Demo without Commitment?
cta.description: Send us a message on WhatsApp now to see how the AI agent answers and manages the inquiry.

q1.question: What is ANINO AI?
q1.answer: ANINO AI is an advanced artificial intelligence system for businesses, enabling automated customer replies on WhatsApp, receiving and making smart voice calls, lead management, and multi-channel marketing.

q2.question: How does the WhatsApp agent work?
q2.answer: The WhatsApp agent replies instantly to customers based on the business profile you set, including opening hours, menus, services, prices, and answers to common questions.

q3.question: Can it make voice calls?
q3.answer: Yes, the system allows the AI agent to answer incoming calls or make outbound calls (e.g. returning to leads) in natural language in real-time.

q4.question: How is billing handled?
q4.answer: Billing is based on actual usage charged from a pre-loaded top-up balance, with no expensive fixed monthly subscription fees, so you control your budget completely.
